query: VHS tape distortion glitch tracking error scanlines
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / analog_degradation: VHS scanlines, tracking errors, pixel grid distortion

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up of two hands pressed against a surface, palms flattened and fingers splayed, viewed through a screen with visible horizontal scanlines. The left hand shows a ring on one finger. The color palette shifts from warm peach and coral tones on the hands to cool cyan and teal in the upper right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extreme close-up of two hands pressed against a surface, palms flattened and fingers splayed, viewed through a screen with prominent VHS-style horizontal scanlines that evoke analog monitor degradation. The image is heavily blurred and lacks fine detail, with facial features and skin textures dissolving into smeared, indistinct forms. Warm peach and coral tones on the hands clash aggressively with cool cyan and teal in the upper right corner, creating chromatic tension. The scanline interference and soft-focus treatment render the subject nearly abstract, where the hands become gestural shapes rather than clearly defined forms.
